title: Basic Setting Up Development Environment
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of Setting Up Development Environment. Focus on implementing VS Code installation and setup correctly.

title: Intermediate Setting Up Development Environment
description: Create a function that uses VS Code installation and setup and Node.js and npm installation together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced Setting Up Development Environment Project
description: Build a small application that applies VS Code installation and setup, Node.js and npm installation, Code formatters (Prettier) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging Setting Up Development Environment
description: The following code has bugs related to VS Code installation and setup. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring Setting Up Development Environment
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with VS Code installation and setup and Node.js and npm installation.
